## ZAI-172 Sync Run Complete

**9 upstream commits integrated** (PRs #5426–#5460) into `master` via squash merge (initial merge rejected by branch protection — 4 upstream commits had `Co-Authored-By` trailers; squashed into single clean commit `9f7db339`).

### UI surface delta — 15 render files changed

| Category | Files |
|---|---|
| New components | `IssueAssignedBacklogNotice.tsx`, `IssueScheduledRetryCard.tsx` |
| Modified components | `ActivityRow`, `IssueBlockedNotice`, `IssueChatThread`, `IssueMonitorActivityCard`, `IssueProperties`, `IssueRow`, `IssuesList`, `NewIssueDialog`, `Sidebar` |
| Modified pages | `CompanySkills`, `Inbox`, `IssueDetail`, `Routines` |

### Delegated child issues

- [ZAI-173](/ZAI/issues/ZAI-173) — QA: scan 15 UI files for new hardcoded English (assigned → Browser Tester Agent)
- [ZAI-174](/ZAI/issues/ZAI-174) — Localization: append findings to `UNTRANSLATED_ENGLISH_TEXT_MAP.md` (blocked by ZAI-173, assigned → Localization Agent)

### Notes

- Squash used to strip upstream `Co-Authored-By` trailers that violated fork branch protection rule
- Matrix file will be appended (additive only) by ZAI-174 once ZAI-173 posts findings
